name: New Berlin System
license: Text adapted from the Honorverse Wiki (Fandom), CC BY-SA.

location.notes: Canon gives 49 ly between Gregor and New Berlin (HH6). Placed relative to Gregor at that distance; the bearing (north-west, putting the Andermani cluster to the galactic west/left of Manticore to match the downloaded fan map and balance the galaxy view) is fabricated (canon:false) — canon describes the Andermani as east of Manticore, but the demo map follows the reference layout.

stars.name: New Berlin
stars.notes: G4 primary (canon). Hosts Potsdam, the Andermani capital. Mass not stated; inferred from G4 if needed (canon:false).

bodies.name: New Berlin II
bodies.lore: Fabricated inner rocky world (canon:false) so the capital system reads as a real system, not 'star + 1 planet'.

orbit.notes: Fabricated by orbit-derive (canon:false): geometric spacing; star mass 1.0 M_sun (mass fabricated from spectral class).

bodies.name: Potsdam
bodies.lore: The capital world of the Andermani Empire and seat of the Anderman dynasty. The Imperial Andermani Navy's primary base, Alpha Station, orbits the planet.

orbit.notes: Fabricated by orbit-derive (canon:false): geometric spacing; star mass 1.0 M_sun (mass fabricated from spectral class).
Fabricated by orbit-derive (canon:false): geometric spacing; star mass 1.0 M_sun (mass fabricated from spectral class).

places.name: Alpha Station
places.lore: The Imperial Andermani Navy's primary naval base, in orbit of Potsdam.

demographics.notes: Population not captured in this pass.

lore.summary: The capital system of the Andermani Empire: a G4 star whose habitable world Potsdam is the imperial capital, guarded by Alpha Station and the Imperial Andermani Navy. ~49 ly from Gregor.

coordinates.notes: Fabricated (canon:false) from canon distance+bearing relative to gregor; Sol origin, +Z galactic north, +X galactic east.
